schema.name: STATUS_CODE_NAME constant
schema.anomaly_classes: which of our 6 anomaly types could trigger this code
schema.iotdb_subsystems: which database subsystems emit this code
schema.common_root_cause: likely root cause hint for ops engineer

compaction.name: COMPACTION_ERROR
compaction.common_root_cause: TsFile merge failed due to corruption, disk space, or schema mismatch

compaction.name: TSFILE_PROCESSOR_ERROR
compaction.common_root_cause: TsFile read/write/merge processor failure; often disk I/O or corruption

full_memory.name: EXECUTE_STATEMENT_ERROR
full_memory.meaning: Execute statement error (often used for query memory OOM)
full_memory.common_root_cause: Query needs more memory than allocated; see FAQ 1.10

full_memory.name: MPP_MEMORY_NOT_ENOUGH
full_memory.meaning: Not enough memory for task execution in MPP
full_memory.common_root_cause: MPP query dispatcher hit memory pool limit
full_memory.fix_hint: reduce query parallelism or increase mpp_data_exchange_memory_proportion

full_memory.name: DISK_SPACE_INSUFFICIENT
full_memory.common_root_cause: data dir or WAL dir filled up; manifest of full_memory often co-occurs
full_memory.fix_hint: free disk, configure tiered storage, or expand cluster

full_memory.name: SYSTEM_READ_ONLY
full_memory.common_root_cause: System auto-switched to read-only (memory exhaustion or recovery)

flush.name: STORAGE_ENGINE_ERROR
flush.common_root_cause: Generic storage engine failure during write/flush path

flush.name: WRITE_PROCESS_ERROR
flush.common_root_cause: Write path failed; may be downstream of Flush stall

flush.name: WRITE_PROCESS_REJECT
flush.common_root_cause: Backpressure: system cannot accept more writes (MemTable saturated, Flush queue full)
flush.fix_hint: decrease write rate, or increase MemTable size / flush_thread_count

network_bandwidth2.name: WRITE_PROCESS_ERROR
network_bandwidth2.meaning: Writing data related error (cluster replication failure)
network_bandwidth2.common_root_cause: Raft replication delay due to network slowness

network_bandwidth2.name: INTERNAL_REQUEST_TIME_OUT
network_bandwidth2.common_root_cause: Internal RPC slow, often network or downstream overload

network_bandwidth2.name: INTERNAL_REQUEST_RETRY_ERROR
network_bandwidth2.common_root_cause: Transient network errors that retry could not resolve

network_bandwidth2.name: CONSENSUS_NOT_INITIALIZED
network_bandwidth2.meaning: Consensus is not initialized and cannot provide service
network_bandwidth2.common_root_cause: Raft consensus group not yet elected leader (startup or after partition)

network_bandwidth2.name: REGION_LEADER_CHANGE_ERROR
network_bandwidth2.common_root_cause: Failed to transfer Raft leadership (network or follower unresponsive)

export.name: LOAD_FILE_ERROR
export.common_root_cause: TsFile load failed (schema mismatch, file corruption, version incompatibility)

export.name: LOAD_PIECE_OF_TSFILE_ERROR
export.meaning: Error when load a piece of TsFile when loading

export.name: DESERIALIZE_PIECE_OF_TSFILE_ERROR
export.meaning: Error when deserialize a piece of TsFile

full_cpu.name: INTERNAL_REQUEST_TIME_OUT
full_cpu.common_root_cause: Possibly CPU saturation slowing operations beyond timeout

full_cpu.name: QUERY_WAS_KILLED
full_cpu.common_root_cause: Query manually killed or watchdog killed runaway CPU-heavy query
